diagnostic_scope.plain_english: Detailed diagnostics reflect this backend instance's local SQLite ingest/archive and cache state. Use the Health page for authoritative operator truth, lane status, and Neon health.

dashboard_serving.plain_english: Risk, Explore, Positions, Health, and other user-facing pages should read compact durable serving payloads instead of rebuilding directly from raw source tables.

operator_status.plain_english: Operator status is the live control-room truth for lane status, holdings dirty state, active snapshot, authoritative source recency, and Neon mirror/parity health.

local_diagnostics.plain_english: This diagnostics endpoint inspects the current backend instance and its local SQLite/cache files. Treat it as a deep local-ingest/archive panel, not the live operator control room.

exposure_source.plain_english: The analytics engine reads barra_raw_cross_section_history as the canonical raw source, then selects a single well-covered exposure snapshot for estimation and serving.
